subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath opened before the faces of His loved ones the gate of meeting with Him and caused them to know [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی فتح علی وجوه اولیائه باب لقائه و عرفهم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @thankfulness; gratitude, @eulogies; reminiscences
